name: devgenie
description: DevGenie - governed, spec-first AI software delivery for Claude Code. Drives a project from brief to first slice through a gated bootstrap: foundation -> independent rating gate -> Phase 0 scaffold -> benchmarked slice builds. Lite is free and online (full feature capture + a real MVP build); Pro builds and gates the production scope from the same captured spec and unlocks the independent signed rating gate, premium templates, an audit-grade decision trail and AI-spend chargeback. Requires Claude Code v2.1.154 or later (plugin header interpolation) and network access.

user_email.title: Your work email
user_email.description: Optional. Captured once at first run as the identity proxy for AI-spend attribution / chargeback (the EY requirement). A first-run hook writes it to ~/.devgenie/config.json, which the per-project metering hook reads as the highest-precedence source for the ledger's user_email — so attribution does not depend on a possibly-misconfigured git config. It is a named proxy, not a verified login.

org.title: Organisation
org.description: Optional. Your team / organisation name, recorded alongside the identity for grouping chargeback.

stack.title: Default stack
stack.description: Optional. The default technology stack (e.g. 'node-ts', 'python'), used to seed scaffold defaults.

license_key.title: DevGenie license key
license_key.description: Required for the preview — enter the DevGenie preview key you were issued. A Lite key gives full feature capture + a real MVP build (online). A Pro or Enterprise key also builds and gates the production scope from the same captured spec, and unlocks the independent signed rating gate, premium templates, audit trail and AI-spend chargeback. Request a key at https://smartgenie.co.uk/devgenie.
